zh.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Harling於1388年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可易亞斯特 哈林。他於1420年與Lady Jane Gonville在英國英格蘭諾福爾可易亞斯特 哈林結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1435年9月9日在他的家鄉享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可易亞斯特 哈林。

nameMeanings.name: Harling
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Harling in Norfolk. The placename means ‘(settlement of) the people of Herela’, from an Old English personal name Herela + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas.
North German: habitational name from any of several places so named, from a derivative of an ancient Germanic personal name with the first element hari, heri ‘army’.

variants.name: Harlin
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: from the Middle English (H)erlin, (H)arlin, (H)erlwin, Old French Herluin, Arluin, (ancient Germanic Erlewin, Herlewin, composed of elements meaning ‘earl’ and ‘friend’). There is late Middle English loss of /w/ after /l/ in forms such as Urlin(g), Earling, Harlin(g).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Harling was born in 1388, in East Harling, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. He married Lady Jane Gonville in 1420, in East Harling, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 9 September 1435, in his hometown, at the age of 47, and was buried in East Harling, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Harlingは1388年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクエアスト ハーリングで生まれた。1420年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクエアスト ハーリングでLady Jane Gonvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1435年9月9日に故郷で47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクエアスト ハーリングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Harling(은)는 1388년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 이스트 하를링에서 태어났다. 그는 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 이스트 하를링에서 Lady Jane Gonville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1435년 9월 9일 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 이스트 하를링에 묻혔다.

ru.Bolton Castle cum Redmire, Yorkshire, En: болтон кастл кум редмир, еркшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Harling родился в 1388 г. в местности эаст харлинг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Jane Gonville в 1420 г. в местности эаст харлинг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 9 сентября 1435 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности эаст харлинг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
